text: TURNOVER + FEES (commander report economics) High turnover was INTENTIONAL — ~$73,789 notional on ~$2k capital. But fees −$317.20 consumed 29% of gross MTM profit. RULE: churn is good ONLY when net_edge_per_dollar > fee_rate. - Productive turnover: calculated lottery wins (NAK, RXT, ELAB…) — vol spike, quick exit - Unproductive turnover: low-conviction entries (<80% setup) and hope-holds — not sector/ticker bans - Bot metric: reward = net_pnl / notional_traded; penalize fee-bleed trips February −7.94% = traded without edge (cold start). March/April +20%/+22% = edge confirmed. Stand aside when conviction < 80% or after loss streak — commander ended flat in cash.
